parameters.subject: ={{ $('Code - Build PDF HTML').item.json.subject }}
parameters.message:
Dear {{ $('Code - Build PDF HTML').item.json.recipientName }},

Please find your document attached.

If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
The Team

parameters.responseBody: ={ "success": true, "message": "PDF generated and emailed to {{ $('Code - Build PDF HTML').item.json.recipientEmail }}" }

meta.description: Form submission triggers HTML invoice/report generation in Code node, submits to PDFMonkey API, polls for completion, downloads binary PDF, then emails it as an attachment via Gmail.
meta.alternatives: Replace PDFMonkey with: html-pdf-node (self-hosted), Puppeteer via n8n Execute Command, or DocRaptor API
prerequisites: PDFMonkey account and API key (or alternative PDF API)
Adjust Wait node to 10-15 seconds for complex PDFs
